title: 33 Reasons I Love You
subtitle: A year full of light 🌸
message: Mergui, watching you step into 33 has been the most beautiful thing. Every day with you is a gentle reminder of what matters. You carry warmth wherever you go — in your laughter, your patience, the way you look at the world. This little corner of the internet is yours. Happy birthday, my love. 🌷
quote: She is both hellfire and holy water, and the flavor you taste depends on how you treat her.

highlights.caption: That golden afternoon in the hills
Dancing at midnight, just the two of us
The morning you made everything feel simple
First snow walk of the year
The flower market on a slow Sunday

memories.title: The long phone call
memories.description: We talked until 3am about absolutely nothing and everything. I remember not wanting to hang up.

memories.title: Cooking disaster
memories.description: The pasta burned, the smoke alarm went off, and we ended up eating cereal at 11pm laughing so hard.

memories.title: That one sunset
memories.description: Neither of us said a word for ten minutes. We didn't need to.

memories.title: The surprise
memories.description: You knew. You somehow always know. But you pretended to be surprised anyway, just for me.

wishes: May every door that opens for you lead somewhere beautiful
May your laughter be loud and your burdens light
May this year bring you every color of joy you deserve
May you always feel as loved as you are
May 33 be the chapter where everything clicks into place 🌸
